domain_expertise.evidence: Applied YOLOv8 for computer vision and implemented RAG pipelines and LLM integration.
Experience designing REST APIs and architecture using Django and DRF.
Currently interning at ICRISAT on AI-powered agro-met advisory scaling.

soft_skills_signals.justification: Explicitly states experience in 'designing REST APIs and backend architectures'.
Mentions 'bridging the gap between robust backend engineering and practical AI applications'.

skill_gaps_or_blind_spots: Lack of demonstrated cloud infrastructure or deployment pipeline (CI/CD) expertise.
Minimal evidence of professional team-based agile software development methodology.
data.skill_progression_narrative: Ram Madhav transitioned from a foundational education in Engineering to building specialized web systems, evidenced by his role-based 'Track-IT' project. He has since evolved his expertise to integrate complex AI/ML pipelines, such as RAG and Computer Vision, applying these skills in an industrial research context at ICRISAT.
data.data_confidence_rationale: Profile is current and provides specific project-based evidence supporting the stated technical skill set and recent industrial experience.
